Petition For Order Allowing A Closing Of The Trust, A Discharge Of The Receiver And Of His Bond, And Distribution Of Remaining Trust Assets To Beneficiary Of The Trust
Off Calendar Oct-15-2013 Advanced From Jan-13-14 To Nov-25-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Allowing A Closing Of The Trust, A Discharge Of The Receiver And Of His Bond, And Distribution Of Remaining Trust Assets To Beneficiary Of The Trust
Off Calendar Dec-06-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Eugene Garfinkle for Stuart Kaplan.

The Court stated that it is prepared to grant the petition to close the Trust but that the only accounting it is approving is for the period of January 2013 through August 2013 and no prior accountings. The Court granted the Petition for Order Allowing a Closing of the Trust, etc. (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Petition Requesting An Earlier Hearing Date For Petition For Order Allowing A Closing Of Trust, Etc.
Off Calendar Oct-15-2013 Granted Per Written Order

Petition Filing The Status Report Of Receiver Acting As Trustee
Off Calendar Oct-17-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Eugene Garfield for Reciever.

Mr. Garfield informed the Court that he filed a Petition to Close the Estate with a hearing date of January 13, 2014 and that he will be filing an ex parte petition to advance the hearing to a date in November. The Court granted the status report (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney and the Trustee to appear on July 30, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration has not been filed. The status hearing was also continued to that date.

Petition For Order Allowing Sale Of Real Property And For Preliminary Distribution Of Assets
Off Calendar Nov-03-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Eugene Garfinkle, Esq. for and with the Petitioner/Trustee Stewart Kaplan.

The Court and parties addressed the issues on bond, escrow and to modify part of an Order, petition is granted pending review of the Oder. Counsel stated that he will revised the last page of the Order and to submit it to court for further review.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Whitehead.

Petition For Order For A Preliminary Distribution Of Trust Assets, For Authority To Engage In Future Acts, And To Reduce The Existing Bond
Off Calendar Aug-06-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Edward Watson for Stuart Kaplan.

Mr. Watson stated that the Receiver was appointed in 1992 when Wells Fargo decided that they could no longer be the Trustee, that there are some environmental issues with the property, that they could not find a Successor Trustee, that Mr. Kaplan agreed to serve only if he was appointed as a Receiver and that the property was being marketed to be sold. An amended order reducing bond was filed on October 31, 2008. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Yee.
